title: Renokas1 RACING PACK
description:
The only ice boat racing modpack you really need!!! FREE* PERFORMANCE INCLUDED! Has all the mods to kick-start your boat race career!

Approved by Renokas1 (me)
body:
# Renokas1 Ice Boat Racing MODPACK 🚣‍♂️🔥

_Due to high demand I am making my modpack public with the purpose of getting into boat racing as easily as possible._

**No** weird keybinds, **no** _(that)_ unnecessary mods, and **all the boat racing** goodies you need! Has a **super solid performance** mods foundation to keep you at your peak!

Soo when making my modpack, my goal is to always to maintain that vanilla-optifine feel with some little fancy extras I like to have! It has my mods settings and keybinds but feel free to change them!

##   

![Main boat racing mods showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb471fb83a2b0fa3af136a0152ac2185f242808f.jpeg)

##   


### **What do they do?**
- **BoatCam**: Turns the camera for you, which makes clearing corners easier.
- **BoatUtils**: Makes your boat go up- and downhill.
- **BoatHud** (Piggle Version): Shows your speed, lap time, and position live.
- **SillyBoat**: Plays sound when hitting walls, adds AE86 speed chime sound when going fast!
- **Bobby**: Keeps your chunks loaded. 
- **And all the sodium based performance mods i have added _(you are welcome)_.**

**NOTE: IT DOES NOT HAVE MINIMAP MOD SINCE YOU DON'T NEED IT WHEN YOU ARE IN 1ST**

##   

##   

### ⭐**HOW TO DOWNLOAD?**⭐
1. Download Modrinth Launcher from [https://modrinth.com/app](https://modrinth.com/app)
2. Inside the Modrinth Launcher, search for "Renokas1 RACING PACK"
3. Click install, wait a minute, and click play!
   **DONE**

**NOTE: THIS PACK IS BASED ON [Simply Optimized MODPACK](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) WITH ADDED BOAT RACING MODS AND MY PERSONAL PREFERENCE MODS!**
